basis: served (weights resident); analytical from real tensor shapes; bandwidth 417.7 GB/s measured on this M3 Ultra
complete_token_forward: demonstrated: the validated streamed forward runs embedding -> 43 layers -> logit lens -> greedy token (deepseek_v4_reference.py + cascade _head_agreement)
energy: UNAVAILABLE (no accepted on-device source; none inferred)
flop_byte_verdict: FEWER_BYTES_MODEST — DeepSeek experts are already fp4 so the functional student's byte win on the MoE is ~9.8x, and attention dominates the token traffic, so the whole-token win is small
honest_scope: analytical served roofline + demonstrated complete-token forward; wall-clock served-TPS pending a resident compact model

roofline_tps.note: bandwidth-bound ceiling = measured BW / active bytes per token; not a measured wall-clock

source_precision: experts already fp4 (0.5 byte), shared fp8, attention fp8 - so functional gain is ~4x on MoE, not 16x
true_tps_measured: streamed forward is streaming-bound (weights reloaded+dequanted per layer), so its wall-clock is not a served-TPS; served-TPS is the roofline above. A measured served-TPS needs the compact model resident, which needs promotion.
